evals.prompt: Please read and summarize the paper at C:\Users\galzi\Downloads\2602.11988v1.pdf. Give me: the title, authors, abstract, and a 3-5 bullet point summary of the main contributions. Make sure you read the columns in the correct order.
evals.expected_output: A structured summary with correct title/authors, accurate abstract, and contributions drawn from left-then-right column reading - not garbled interleaved text from both columns at once.
assertions: The output includes the paper title
The abstract is reproduced coherently (no mid-sentence jumps to unrelated topics)
The contributions/bullet points are coherent sentences, not garbled mixes of two column streams
The output does not contain obvious column-interleaving artifacts (e.g., a sentence that jumps topic mid-phrase due to reading across columns)

evals.prompt: I have a two-column research paper at C:\Users\galzi\Downloads\2602.11988v1.pdf. Extract and reproduce the Introduction section verbatim (or near-verbatim). The text should read naturally from start to finish.
evals.expected_output: The Introduction section text flowing naturally, reading the left column fully before the right column, with no interleaving artifacts. Text should be coherent paragraphs.
assertions: The extracted text reads as coherent paragraphs (no topic-jumping mid-sentence)
The text length is substantial (introduction of academic paper should be at least 200 words)
No obvious reading-order error: a sentence from the right column does not appear before its left-column predecessor
